violations.text: The area by the ice machine for packaging ice lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off during time of inspection and placed out of order. Ice machine is to be emptied and cleaned. Photo of clean and sanitized ice machine is to be sent to RIDOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
